mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM shelf_capacity
AND shelf_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shelfNo}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE shelf_capacity SET current_pin_boxes = GREATEST(0, current_pin_boxes - #{quantity}), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE shelf_capacity SET current_shim_packs = GREATEST(0, current_shim_packs - #{quantity}), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
